name: woodpecker
description: Safe Woodpecker CI API client and pipeline generation skills.

interface.shortDescription: Inspect, diagnose, and restart Woodpecker pipelines safely.
interface.longDescription: Woodpecker packages a safe API client for pipeline status, base64 log decoding, and explicit-confirmation restarts, plus the pipeline-generation skill.
defaultPrompt: Use /woodpecker-status to inspect a Woodpecker pipeline.
